format_requirement: Written in one or more readily accessible parts
risk_factors: Must be appropriate to: (a) size, scope and type of business; (b) amount of resources available; (c) amount of stored data; and (d) need for security and confidentiality.
mandatory_components: Must contain administrative, technical, and physical safeguards. Includes designating an employee to maintain it, identifying/assessing risks, employee training, disciplinary measures, service provider oversight, physical access restrictions, regular monitoring, and at least annual review.
